content: Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement framework can be repurposed as a backbone to unify fragmented multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of self-feedback pulls from a distinct inconsistent solving perspective to surface hidden flaws that single-perspective reflection would miss. This creates a fully unsupervised self-reflection system that requires no extra training, supervision, or external data to improve LLM outputs beyond what either approach achieves alone.
